subcodes.first_line: O Thou Lord of the Kingdom! Confer discernment and wisdom upon this maidservant and glorify her in the eternal World.... Today all the beloved of God in those parts must endeavour that the Chicago Mashrak-el-Azkar
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب الملکوت این کنیز را فرهنگ و تمیز بخش و در جهان ابدی عزیز کن
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @wisdom [hikmat], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
